title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 472.180 - Time for appeal
text:
472.180.  Time for appeal. — All appeals shall be taken within the time prescribed by the rules of civil procedure relating to appeals.
(RSMo 1939 § 285, A.L. 1955 p. 385 § 21, A.L. 1978 H.B. 1634) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 286; 1919 § 283; 1909 § 290 
Effective 1-02-79
